channel.title: Policy on Code Before Breach
channel.description: Recent content in Policy on Code Before Breach

item.title: Is Your Data in the Cat's Paws?
item.description: Analysis of the 2025 KakaoPay breach exposing 40M users' data, and why formal consent fails without AI-based DPIA and civic oversight.

item.title: There’s No Such Thing as a Free Lunch, But Security Was Free
item.description: The CVE system nearly collapsed in 2025. Who should fund public cybersecurity infrastructure when free-riding is no longer sustainable?
